commands.review_summary:
The PR marks the cron Run history card as a scroll target, scrolls it into view after a job History click, and adds focused cron view coverage for that behavior.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +38. Total +47 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main renders Run history below the jobs list and the History button only calls onLoadRuns, so a long cron page can leave the visible viewport unchanged. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
